hero.title: The Future of Payments, Today.
hero.description: Everpay provides seamless, secure, and scalable payment solutions for businesses of all sizes. Empower your growth with our innovative technology.

features.title: Why Choose Everpay?
features.description: Our platform is built to help your business thrive in the digital economy.
features.feature1Description: Accept payments from anywhere in the world, in any currency.
features.feature2Description: Protect your transactions with state-of-the-art fraud prevention.
features.feature3Description: Easily integrate our APIs with your existing systems.
features.feature4Description: Grow your business without worrying about payment infrastructure.
features.feature5Description: Our dedicated team is always here to help you succeed.
features.feature6Description: Transparent and affordable rates for all your payment needs.

stats.title: Trusted by Businesses Worldwide
stats.description: Join thousands of satisfied merchants who rely on Everpay for their payment processing.

paymentPartners.title: Accept All Major Payment Methods
paymentPartners.description: From credit cards to digital wallets, Everpay supports a wide range of payment options to maximize your conversion rates.

checkoutProtection.title: Secure Checkout & Fraud Prevention
checkoutProtection.description: Protect your business and customers with our advanced security features.
checkoutProtection.feature1Description: Leverage machine learning to identify and block suspicious transactions in real-time.
checkoutProtection.feature2Description: Ensure your payment processing meets the highest industry security standards.
checkoutProtection.feature3Description: Add an extra layer of security for card-not-present transactions.
checkoutProtection.feature4Description: Minimize losses from fraudulent chargebacks with our robust dispute management.

businessTypes.title: Solutions for Every Business Type
businessTypes.description: Whether you're a small startup or a large enterprise, Everpay has tailored solutions to meet your unique payment needs.
businessTypes.ecommerceDescription: Seamless online payments for your e-commerce store.
businessTypes.retailDescription: Modernize your in-store payments with our POS solutions.
businessTypes.marketplaceDescription: Manage complex payouts and commissions with ease.
businessTypes.saasDescription: Automate recurring billing and subscription management.
businessTypes.servicesDescription: Accept payments for appointments, bookings, and more.
businessTypes.nonProfitDescription: Secure and easy donation processing for your cause.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Payments?
cta.description: Join Everpay today and experience the future of secure and efficient payment processing.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have questions or need assistance? Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully!
contact.errorMessage: There was an error sending your message. Please try again later.
